text: you have permission to struggle. every gym session, every early morning, is a step closer to your dreams. even when it doesn't feel like it, you're moving forward

text: what's one thing you can do today to move closer to your goals? for me, it's getting back to the gym after 2 months off. small steps, daily

text: 3 things i've learned from my first week back at the gym: every rep is a struggle, consistency is key, and the cost of giving up is losing sight of my dreams. don't let fear hold you back
